documents.title: Notion
documents.text_excerpt: Notion (function(){var e,r=window.navigator.userAgent,t=/Windows.*Edge/i.test(r),i=!t&&/Chrome/i.test(r);if(i){if((e=r.match(/Chrome\/(\d+)/i))&&e[1])return parseInt(e[1],10)<=84}else if(t||i||!/Safari/i.test(r))if(/Firefox/i.test(r)){if((e=r.match(/Firefox\/(\d+)/i))&&e[1])return parseInt(e[1],10)<=114}else{if(t)return!0;if(/Trident/i.test(r))return!0}else if((e=r.match(/Version\/(\d+)/i))&&e[1])return parseInt(e[1],10)<=13;return!1})()&&window.location.replace("/unsupported-browser.html") window.__webStartTime=performance.now(),performance.mark("__webStartTime") try{if(Math.random()<.01){["/blank","/login","/meeting-notification","/quick-search","/desktop-nosey"].includes(window.location.pathname)||(window.CLIENT_LOAD_TAG=Math.random().toString(16).substring(2),fetch("/api/v3/recordClientLoadAttempt",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json; charset=utf-8"},body:JSON.stringify({tag:window.CLIENT_LOAD_TAG,pathname:window.location.pathname,hostname:window.location.hostname,version:"23.13.20260427.0931",htmlType:"web"}),priority:"low"}))}}catch(t){console.error("Failed to beacon load attempt",t)} body{background:#fff}body.dark{background:#191919}@keyframes startup-sh
